problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
